Summary 
What are colonoscopy and flexible sigmoidoscopy? 
Colonoscopy and flexible sigmoidoscopy are procedures that let your doctor look inside your rectum and colon (large intestine). They use instruments called scopes. Scopes have a light and a tiny camera at
